items.question: Can I commission a custom artwork?
items.answer: Yes! I love creating artwork that is unique for people's homes. Get in touch to discuss colours, sizes, prices, and ideas that you have.

items.question: When will my artwork arrive?
items.answer: If you ordered an original artwork, a courier will be booked and you will receive tracking information via email. You can expect your artwork to arrive within 7-15 days. Paintings are packaged and sent by hand, so please be patient.

items.question: How will my artwork arrive?
items.answer: If you ordered an original artwork, it will arrive carefully packed between corflute sheets, bubble wrapped, and secured with packing tape.

items.question: Can I receive a refund if I change my mind?
items.answer: Please measure up and choose carefully, as unfortunately I cannot offer a refund.

items.question: Do you ship internationally?
items.answer: Yes! Get in touch to receive a shipping quote to your country of origin.

items.question: I own a store and would love to stock your work.
items.answer: Thank you so much, let's discuss your idea. Contact me via Instagram or email.
